title: CCL - Selecting AI Noise Block
scenario: AI Noise Block option can be selected in Device Settings > Advanced on Poly Studio Mobile app for Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 60, and Voyager Legend 50
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a supported device (Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 60, or Voyager Legend 50) is connected.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Scroll down and tap on 'Advanced' in the Device Settings menu.
Locate the 'AI Noise Block' option in the Advanced settings list.
Tap on the 'AI Noise Block' toggle or option to select/enable it.
expected: The 'AI Noise Block' option is selectable and can be enabled successfully in Device Settings > Advanced for supported devices.
